name: Sony (FCB series)
notes: FCB-EV7520 (30x), FCB-ER9500 (30x 4K), FCB-EW9500H (30x 4K HDMI), FCB-ER8530 (20x 4K). Industry standard block cameras.

name: Tamron
notes: MP3010M-EV (10x, 70g, LVDS/HDMI/UVC). Ultra-compact camera modules.

name: Viewsheen
notes: Hangzhou. 2MP-4K zoom modules, 10x-100x. OEM/ODM. Also makes gimbal assemblies.

name: KT&C
notes: ATC-HZ series: 10x, 22x, 30x, 40x. Global shutter 4K MIPI and HDMI options.

name: Videology
notes: SCAiLX Edge AI zoom block cameras. 10x-55x autofocus. US manufacturer.

name: Skoopia
notes: 85Z18H (18x 4K HDMI+MIPI). Sony FCB replacements with VISCA protocol.

name: Active Silicon
notes: Harrier cameras — interface boards for Sony FCB and Tamron modules. 3G-SDI, USB3, Ethernet IP.

name: Savgood
notes: Hangzhou. SG-ZCM series. 23x-90x zoom modules. 2MP/4MP/8MP. Network and LVDS.

name: Linovision (Hinovision)
notes: Zoom camera modules 4x-90x. Network block cameras. 36-pin cable, SDK/ISAPI.

name: YXF Camera
notes: OEM camera modules. 20x optical zoom with IMX415. USB/HDMI. Shenzhen.

name: Huanyu (Univision)
notes: UAV zoom modules. 4MP 10x, 2MP 26x, 100x. OIS drone camera modules.

name: VA Imaging
notes: 2MP 10x autofocus zoom MIPI camera for Raspberry Pi.

name: e-con Systems
notes: MIPI, GMSL, USB camera modules. May have zoom options.

name: iShot (InterTest)
notes: XBlock XBC-KZ36G (36x), XBC-KZ10 (10x). Distributor for Sony FCB, KT&C, iShot brand.

name: Aegis Electronic Group
notes: Distributor for Sony FCB, Tamron. Also custom interface boards.

name: Dahua
notes: Makes zoom camera modules/cores for OEM. Major CCTV manufacturer.

name: Hikvision
notes: Makes zoom camera modules/cores for OEM. Major CCTV manufacturer.

name: RMA Electronics
notes: Distributor for Sony FCB cameras.

name: Allwan
notes: European distributor for Sony FCB modules with HDMI/MIPI/LVDS.

name: Z3 Technology
notes: IP video encoder solutions for block cameras.

name: Sinoseen
notes: OEM USB camera module with 8MP optical zoom and IMX415.

name: CAMEMAKE
notes: Chinese camera module manufacturer. May have zoom modules.

name: evision systems
notes: Distributor for Sony FCB, Tamron modules. Technical documentation.
